hero_intro: DevOps / Platform Engineer with 2+ years of hands-on experience. Building cloud infrastructure on GCP & Azure — from Terraform modules to CI/CD pipelines to monitoring stacks.
about_text_1: I got into DevOps the way most good things happen — by being around someone who lives and breathes it. Watching a platform engineer build infrastructure daily, I got curious. Then I got hooked. Since 2022 I've been learning, building, and going deeper every month.
about_text_2: I don't memorize commands — I understand what's happening under the hood. How containers use namespaces and cgroups, how Terraform maintains state, how a CI/CD pipeline progresses from commit to production. I care about the "why" as much as the "how".
about_text_3: Under mentorship I've built real projects — from Terraform modules and CI/CD pipelines to monitoring stacks and AI infrastructure. I've also explored MLOps, bridging DevOps and machine learning deployment. Each project grew from a real need, not a tutorial.
about_quote: I don't just learn tools — I understand why they exist and what problems they solve.
resume_summary: DevOps / Platform Engineer with 2+ years of hands-on experience building cloud infrastructure on GCP and Azure. Structured learning (8 GCP badges, 35+ labs) combined with real project work under mentorship — from Terraform modules and CI/CD pipelines to monitoring stacks and ML infrastructure. Focused on understanding systems deeply, not just tools.
resume_exp1_company: Under guidance of a Senior Platform Engineer
resume_exp1_p1: Built CI/CD pipeline for a production AI platform: unit tests → lint → type check → build → native tests (~3 min, fail-fast)
resume_exp1_p2: Maintained 900+ test suite across 48 suites with per-module coverage thresholds and regression gates
resume_exp1_p3: Conducted 4 rounds of security audits, reducing false positive rate from 36% to under 5%
resume_exp1_p4: Set up monitoring: watchdog liveness checks, per-provider latency tracking (TTFT), connection health metrics
resume_exp1_p5: Automated multi-stage build pipeline: frontend → native compile → code signing → packaging
resume_exp1_p6: Participated in architecture discussions, code reviews, and security audits
resume_exp2_p1: Completed 35+ hands-on labs covering Compute, Networking, GKE, Terraform, CI/CD, Observability
resume_exp2_p2: Earned 8 skill badges including Terraform, Kubernetes, DevOps Workflows, Load Balancing
resume_exp2_p3: Progressed from basic VM creation to multi-service Kubernetes deployments
resume_exp3_p1: Studying Azure fundamentals: VMs, App Service, AKS, Azure DevOps
resume_exp3_p3: Preparing for AZ-900 Azure Fundamentals certification
resume_edu_note: Pivoted to DevOps/Cloud engineering during studies, combining analytical thinking from IR with technical skills

about_preview: I got into DevOps by being around someone who lives it daily — and it clicked. Since 2022 I've been building cloud infrastructure on GCP and Azure, earning GCP badges, and shipping real projects. From Terraform modules to CI/CD pipelines, from container orchestration to observability — I build, automate, and understand why.
gitops_desc: From code commit to production — a fully automated GitOps pipeline
cicd_desc: Click deploy to trigger the pipeline
infra_desc: Watch Terraform bring infrastructure to life
monitoring_desc: Production observability — because you can't fix what you can't see
